overview.value: Fiddle Leaf Fig is an indoor tree with large violin-shaped leaves. It rewards stable bright light and steady watering but dislikes frequent movement.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Fiddle Leaf Fig","overview":"Fiddle Leaf Fig is an indoor tree with large violin-shaped leaves. It rewards stable bright light and steady watering but dislikes frequent movement.","tips":"Avoid moving it often; choose a bright spot and let it settle."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"琴叶榕","overview":"琴叶榕是一种室内树形植物，拥有大而像小提琴的叶片。它需要稳定的强散射光和规律浇水，不喜欢频繁移动。","tips":"选好明亮位置后尽量少移动，让它有时间适应环境。"}}
